name: stripe-in-narrative
text:
Alex Chen — Senior Software Engineer
alex@example.com | +1 555-0100

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Backend engineer with 8 years building payment infrastructure and data platforms.

EXPERIENCE
Senior Engineer, Acme Co (2021-present)
- Built a Stripe checkout integration handling $2M/mo in transactions
- Migrated the data warehouse from Redshift to Snowflake; cut nightly batch by 40%
- Owned the FastAPI service powering the customer portal
- Operated Postgres replicas and tuned the Redis cache layer

EDUCATION
Bachelor's in Computer Science, State University (2014)

name: infra-narrative
